A

add(int, CharacterCell) - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalLine
Adds a new character cell at a specific index Throws an IndexOutOfBoundsException if the given index is not in the range [0, size)
add(CharacterCell) - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalLine
Adds a new character cell at a specific index
addAll(Collection<? extends CharacterCell>) - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalLine
Wrapper for ArrayList.addAll()
addToBack(T) - Method in class org.Buffer.CircularArray
Adds the new value at the back of the CircularArray and moves the pointer to the back of the CircularArray one index to the right If the size of the array is >= the capacity of the array, it grows the array by a factor of 2
addToFront(T) - Method in class org.Buffer.CircularArray
Moves the pointer to the front of the CircularArray one index to the left and then adds the new value at this new position If the size of the array is >= the capacity of the array, it grows the array by a factor of 2

B

BLACK - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Colour
 
BLUE - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Colour
 
BOLD - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Style
 
BRIGHT_BLACK - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Colour
 
BRIGHT_BLUE - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Colour
 
BRIGHT_CYAN - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Colour
 
BRIGHT_GREEN - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Colour
 
BRIGHT_MAGENTA - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Colour
 
BRIGHT_RED - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Colour
 
BRIGHT_WHITE - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Colour
 
BRIGHT_YELLOW - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Colour
 
BufferIO - Class in org.Buffer
Class to act as input manager for the TerminalBuffer Operates using a series of user commands, similar to vim
BufferIO() - Constructor for class org.Buffer.BufferIO
Default constructor Sets the screen size to be 10x10, infinite scrollback, white background and black foreground

C

CharacterCell - Class in org.Buffer
Class to represent a single character cell within the terminal.
CharacterCell(Character) - Constructor for class org.Buffer.CharacterCell
Constructor for a non-wide CharacterCell where all other attributes are set to default values, i.e.
CharacterCell(Character, Colour, Colour, boolean[]) - Constructor for class org.Buffer.CharacterCell
Constructor for a CharacterCell where the trailer flag is automatically set to false.
CharacterCell(Character, Colour, Colour, boolean[], TrailFlag) - Constructor for class org.Buffer.CharacterCell
Constructor for a CharacterCell
CharacterCell(Character, TrailFlag) - Constructor for class org.Buffer.CharacterCell
Constructor for a wide CharacterCell where all other attributes are set to default values, i.e.
CircularArray<T> - Class in org.Buffer
Since the default java ArrayDeque does not support getting elements by index, I have been forced to implement my own data structure which supports adding elements at the front and back as well as direct array indexing.
CircularArray() - Constructor for class org.Buffer.CircularArray
Constructor for the CircularArray that defaults the initial capacity to 16
CircularArray(int) - Constructor for class org.Buffer.CircularArray
Constructor that allows the specification of the capacity of the CircularArray Throws an IllegalArgumentException if the specified capacity is negative
clear() - Method in class org.Buffer.CircularArray
Clears all of the elements in the CircularArray
clear() - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalLine
Clears the characters stored in this TerminalLine
CLEAR_BUFFER - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Command
 
CLEAR_LINE - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Command
 
CLEAR_SCREEN - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Command
 
clearEntireBuffer() - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalBuffer
Clears all data in screen and scrollback buffers and resets the cursor position
clearLine() - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalBuffer
Clears the last line in the buffer and rebuilds the screen if necessary.
clearScreen() - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalBuffer
Clears the lines from the screen.
Colour - Enum Class in org.Buffer
Enum to represent the 16 standard terminal colours using this as a reference: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ANSI_escape_code#Colors It also contains the special DEFAULT enum.
Command - Enum Class in org.Buffer
 
COMMAND - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Mode
 
copy(CharacterCell) - Method in class org.Buffer.CharacterCell
Copies all of the internal variables of a different CharacterCell into the caller
createNewLine() - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalBuffer
Adds an empty line to the bottom of the screen and removes extra lines if we are over the scrollback buffer.
CYAN - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Colour
 

D

DEFAULT - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Colour
 
DELETE - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Command
 
deleteText() - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalBuffer
Moves the cursor left one position and removes the character at the cursor's new position If the cursor lands on a wide char, removes both characters in the char
DOWN - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Command
 

E

equals(Object) - Method in class org.Buffer.CharacterCell
Checks if two CharacterCells are equal by checking for equality between all constituent variables

F

fillLineWithChar(Character) - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalBuffer
Fills a terminal line with the specified character starting from the cursor's current screen position e.g.
fillLineWithChar(CharacterCell) - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalBuffer
Fills a terminal line with the specified character starting from the cursor's current screen position e.g.

G

get(int) - Method in class org.Buffer.CircularArray
Returns the element at the specified index of the CircularArray Throws an IndexOutOfBoundsException if the provided index is less than 0 or greater than or equal to the CircularArray's size
get(int) - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalLine
Gets the character cell at a specific index Throws an IndexOutOfBoundsException if the given index is not in the range [0, size)

Function to poll the user for input

getStyleAtCursorPos() - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalBuffer

I

INSERT - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Command
 
INSERT - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Mode
 
insertText(Character) - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalBuffer
Inserts text at the mouse cursor's position only if the cursor is at the bottom of the screen and scrollback Moves the cursor to the right w times, where w is the width of the input Character If the cursor starts at the end of a wide character, moves one space to the left before writing If inserting the input at the current position would overlap with other wide characters, erase them first
ITALIC - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Style
 

L

LEFT - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Command
 

M

MAGENTA - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Colour
 
main(String[]) - Static method in class org.Buffer.Main
 
Main - Class in org.Buffer
 
Main() - Constructor for class org.Buffer.Main
 
mainLoop() - Method in class org.Buffer.BufferIO
The main execution loop after the user has provided input
Mode - Enum Class in org.Buffer
 
moveCursorX(Integer) - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalBuffer
Moves the cursor's x position by some amount of steps.
moveCursorY(Integer) - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalBuffer
Moves the cursor's y position by some amount of steps.

NEW_LINE - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Command
 
NONE - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Command
 
NONE - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Style
 
NORMAL - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.TrailFlag
 

O

org.Buffer - package org.Buffer
 
overwriteText(Character) - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalBuffer
Overwrites text at the mouse cursor's current position only if the cursor is at the bottom of the screen and scrollback.

RED - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Colour
 
remove(int) - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalLine
Wrapper for ArrayList.remove()
removeFromBack() - Method in class org.Buffer.CircularArray
Moves the pointer to the front of the array one index to the left.
removeFromFront() - Method in class org.Buffer.CircularArray
Returns the value at the front of the CircularArray, setting its internal value to null and moving the pointer to the front of the array one index to the right.
REPLACE - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Command
 
REPLACE - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Mode
 
RIGHT - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Command
 

S

scroll(Integer) - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalBuffer
Moves the bottom index of the screen by some number of spaces Clears the current screen buffer and rebuilds it using the new bottom of the screen as a reference into the scrollback
SET_HEIGHT - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Command
 
SET_WIDTH - Enum constant in enum class org.Buffer.Command
 
setAllStyleFlags(boolean[]) - Method in class org.Buffer.CharacterCell
 
setBackgroundColour(Colour) - Method in class org.Buffer.CharacterCell
 
setBackgroundColourAtCursorPos(Colour) - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalBuffer
Sets the background colour at the mouse cursor's current position only if the cursor is at the bottom of the screen and scrollback.
setCharacter(Character) - Method in class org.Buffer.CharacterCell
 
setCursorX(Integer) - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalBuffer
Sets a cursor's x position to the specified position, clamped between [0, logical line width) If the cursor ends at a cell with TrailFlag WIDE_END, move one cell to the left
setCursorY(Integer) - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalBuffer
Sets a cursor's y position to the specified position, clamped between [0, scrollback height) If the new position is on a line off of the screen, scroll
setForegroundColour(Colour) - Method in class org.Buffer.CharacterCell
 
setForegroundColourAtCursorPos(Colour) - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalBuffer
Sets the foreground colour at the mouse cursor's current position only if the cursor is at the bottom of the screen and scrollback.
setHeight(Integer) - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalBuffer
Sets the height of the screen and rebuilds the layout
setScreenBackgroundColour(Colour) - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalBuffer
 
setScreenForegroundColour(Colour) - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalBuffer
 
setScrollMaximum(Integer) - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalBuffer
Sets the maximum amount of lines that can be stored in the scrollback buffer
setStyleAtCursorPos(Style, boolean) - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalBuffer
Sets the style at the mouse cursor's current position only if the cursor is at the bottom of the screen and scrollback.
setStyleFlag(Style, boolean) - Method in class org.Buffer.CharacterCell
Sets the provided style flag for this char to the given value
setTrailFlag(TrailFlag) - Method in class org.Buffer.CharacterCell
 
setWidth(Integer) - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalBuffer
Sets the width of the screen and rebuilds the layout
size() - Method in class org.Buffer.CircularArray
 
size() - Method in class org.Buffer.TerminalLine
 
Style - Enum Class in org.Buffer
Style flags for a character

T

TerminalBuffer - Class in org.Buffer
A class implementing a Terminal text buffer for holding the text currently on the screen and that has been scrolled past Stores two buffers for the screen and scrollback content, alongside the current cursor position It also stores the maximum amount of data you can store in the scrollback buffer and the foreground and background colours the screen should default to.
TerminalBuffer(Integer, Integer, Integer) - Constructor for class org.Buffer.TerminalBuffer
Constructor for a TerminalBuffer not including paramters for screen colours.
TerminalBuffer(Integer, Integer, Integer, Colour, Colour) - Constructor for class org.Buffer.TerminalBuffer
Constructor for a TerminalBuffer including paramters for screen colours
TerminalLine - Class in org.Buffer
Represents a terminal line, i.e.
TerminalLine(int) - Constructor for class org.Buffer.TerminalLine
Default constructor for an unwrapped line
TerminalLine(int, boolean) - Constructor for class org.Buffer.TerminalLine
Creates a new Terminal line Throws an IllegalArgumentException for negative values of capacity
TrailFlag - Enum Class in org.Buffer
 

U
